name: pulld
description: Production-ready, accessible, theme-aware UI components for shadcn/ui — installable with the shadcn CLI or your AI coding agent.

scripts.registry:build: npx --yes shadcn@latest build && node scripts/inject-base.mjs && node scripts/build-landing.mjs && node scripts/build-llms.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run registry:build && npm run verify
scripts.build:pro: npx --yes shadcn@latest build pro/registry.json -o pro/dist && node scripts/build-pro.mjs
scripts.deploy: SITE_BASE=https://pulld.pages.dev npm run registry:build && SITE_BASE=https://pulld.pages.dev npm run build:pro && npx --yes wrangler@latest pages deploy
scripts.db:schema: npx --yes wrangler@latest d1 execute pulld --remote --file db/schema.sql
